foxs_prayer.name: Fox's Prayer
foxs_prayer.fixed_attribute: +8% Damage to Targets Out of Cover
foxs_prayer.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
foxs_prayer.notes: Best-in-slot kneepads for virtually every DPS build. The +8% DtTooC is multiplicative damage that stacks with nothing else, making it extremely potent. Must-have for all red builds.

contractors_gloves.name: Contractor's Gloves
contractors_gloves.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
contractors_gloves.notes: Best-in-slot gloves for DPS builds. +8% DtA is multiplicative and invaluable against armored NPCs and PvP targets. Pair with Fox's Prayer for maximum multiplicative stacking.

the_sacrifice.name: The Sacrifice
the_sacrifice.fixed_attribute: Perfect Glass Cannon: +30% Total Weapon Damage, +60% Incoming Damage
the_sacrifice.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
the_sacrifice.notes: Top-tier DPS chest. Perfect Glass Cannon gives +30% total weapon damage (vs 25% normal). The 60% incoming damage penalty requires skill but the damage output is unmatched. Staple in all glass cannon DPS builds.

the_gift.name: The Gift
the_gift.fixed_attribute: Perfect Vigilance: +25% Weapon Damage, lost for 4s when taking damage
the_gift.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
the_gift.notes: Strong DPS backpack. Perfect Vigilance gives +25% weapon damage (vs 25% normal Vigilance but with shorter penalty window). Popular alternative to Composure for players who maintain distance.

hollow_man.name: Hollow Man
hollow_man.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
hollow_man.notes: Excellent PvP mask. +21% DtH is multiplicative and highly effective against health-heavy agents in the DZ and Conflict. Less useful in PvE where most enemies have armor.

forge.name: Forge
forge.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
forge.notes: Essential for shield builds. The massive +50% shield health bonus makes Bulwark and Crusader shields significantly tankier. Core piece for any Foundry Bulwark or shield-focused Heartbreaker build.

chill_out.name: Chill Out
chill_out.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
chill_out.notes: Named Gila Guard mask with Scanner Pulse Haste. Enables near-permanent pulse uptime for Spotter/Flatline builds. Useful in hybrid tank-skill setups.

named_fenris_chest.name: Force Kicker
named_fenris_chest.fixed_attribute: Perfect Overwatch: +12% Weapon Damage to allies in cover for 10s
named_fenris_chest.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
named_fenris_chest.notes: Niche support chest for team play. Perfect Overwatch buffs allies when you enter cover. More useful in coordinated groups than solo play.

chainkiller.name: Chainkiller
chainkiller.fixed_attribute: Perfect Headhunter: Headshot kills grant +150% Headshot Damage for next shot (stacks)
chainkiller.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
chainkiller.notes: Best-in-slot for sniper/MMR builds. Perfect Headhunter chains one-shot kills with massive stacking headshot damage. Mandatory for Aces & Eights and Tip of the Spear sniper builds.

the_apartment.name: The Apartment
the_apartment.fixed_attribute: Perfect Measured: Top half of magazine +20% RoF/-20% damage, bottom half -20% RoF/+20% damage
the_apartment.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
the_apartment.notes: Named MP5. Perfect Measured provides consistent DPS across the magazine. Decent SMG but outclassed by Dark Winter and Lady Death in most scenarios.

dark_winter.name: Dark Winter
dark_winter.fixed_attribute: Perfect Killer: Killing an enemy with a critical hit grants +50% CHD for 10s
dark_winter.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
dark_winter.notes: Named MPX. Perfect Killer makes this excellent for clearing content. The +50% CHD on crit kill chains extremely well in target-rich environments. Strong PvE SMG.

the_virginian.name: The Virginian
the_virginian.fixed_attribute: Perfect Boomerang: Critical hits have a 60% chance to return the bullet
the_virginian.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
the_virginian.notes: Named 1886. Perfect Boomerang returns ammo on crits. Fun but outclassed by Headhunter-focused rifles. Niche use in builds with high CHC.

the_grudge.name: The Grudge
the_grudge.fixed_attribute: Perfect Vindictive: Killing a status-affected enemy grants +18% CHC and +18% CHD to allies for 10s
the_grudge.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
the_grudge.notes: Named Vector. Perfect Vindictive provides team-wide crit buffs when killing status-affected targets. Niche but powerful in status-heavy team compositions.

the_mop.name: The Mop
the_mop.fixed_attribute: Perfect Pummel: 3 body shot kills in 30s refills magazine and grants +50% weapon damage for 10s
the_mop.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
the_mop.notes: Named M870. Perfect Pummel rewards aggressive shotgun play. Effective in close-quarters PvE content like Summit and Countdown.

railsplitter.name: Railsplitter
railsplitter.fixed_attribute: Perfect Steady Handed: Every 100 hits refills magazine, grants +25% weapon handling for 20s
railsplitter.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
railsplitter.notes: Named FAMAS. Perfect Steady Handed provides infinite magazine sustain in extended firefights. Excellent with Striker's Battlegear for maintaining stacks without reloading.

mechanical_animal.name: Mechanical Animal
mechanical_animal.fixed_attribute: Perfect Spike: Headshot kills grant +25% Skill Damage for 20s
mechanical_animal.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
mechanical_animal.notes: Named Mk16. Perfect Spike bridges gun damage and skill damage. Useful in hybrid DPS/Skill builds that alternate between shooting and deploying skills.

bakers_dozen.name: Baker's Dozen
bakers_dozen.fixed_attribute: Perfect Lucky Shot: Magazine capacity increased by 100%, missed shots returned to magazine
bakers_dozen.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
bakers_dozen.notes: Named M1A Classic. Perfect Lucky Shot effectively doubles magazine and forgives missed shots. One of the best rifles for sustained DPS, especially from range.

surge.name: Surge
surge.fixed_attribute: Perfect Spike: Headshots grant +25% Skill Damage for 20s
surge.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
surge.notes: Named M1A CQB. Perfect Spike for skill/rifle hybrid builds. The CQB variant has faster handling than the Classic M1A.

invisible_hand.name: Invisible Hand
invisible_hand.fixed_attribute: Perfect Finisher: Swapping from this weapon grants +35% weapon damage for 15s
invisible_hand.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
invisible_hand.notes: Named D50. Perfect Finisher provides a massive damage buff on weapon swap. Equip as secondary, swap to primary for a burst damage window. Very strong in optimized builds.

the_reformed.name: The Reformed
the_reformed.fixed_attribute: Perfect Reformation: Headshot kills grant +30% Skill Repair and +30% Skill Damage for 20s
the_reformed.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
the_reformed.notes: Named M700. Perfect Reformation bridges sniper play with skill support. Niche in hybrid healer builds that want to contribute damage between heals.

safety_distance.name: Safety Distance
safety_distance.fixed_attribute: Perfect Ranger: +2% weapon damage for every 5m from target
safety_distance.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
safety_distance.notes: Named ACR. Perfect Ranger rewards long-range AR play. Effective on large open-world maps but less useful in confined mission spaces.

the_burnout.name: The Burnout
the_burnout.fixed_attribute: Perfect Ignited: +20% weapon damage to burning targets
the_burnout.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
the_burnout.notes: Named AK-M. Perfect Ignited pairs well with fire-based skill builds (Fire Sticky, Firestarter Chem Launcher). Niche but devastating in Eclipse Protocol hybrid builds.

the_sleigher.name: The Sleigher
the_sleigher.fixed_attribute: Perfect Flatline: +15% damage to Pulsed targets (replaces normal Flatline)
the_sleigher.source: Targeted Loot, Season Events, Named Item Caches
the_sleigher.notes: Seasonal named SMG. Perfect Flatline provides consistent damage to pulsed targets. Works well with Scanner Pulse or Technician laser pointer.

named_sawyers_kneepads.name: Sawyer's Kneepads
named_sawyers_kneepads.fixed_attribute: Unique: Standing still for 10s grants up to +30% weapon damage (stacks over time)
named_sawyers_kneepads.source: Named Bosses, Legendary Missions, Named Item Caches
named_sawyers_kneepads.notes: Excellent for stationary DPS play. The stacking damage buff rewards positioning and patience. Best in Legendary missions and Raids where you hold angles. Competes with Fox's Prayer.

emperors_guard.name: Emperor's Guard
emperors_guard.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
emperors_guard.notes: Named Murakami kneepads with armor regeneration. Useful in tank builds that want the Murakami 1pc bonus alongside sustain.

punch_drunk.name: Punch Drunk
punch_drunk.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
punch_drunk.notes: Strong mask for headshot-focused builds. The +20% HSD pairs perfectly with rifles and MMRs. Combined with the 5.11 1pc +30% Health bonus, it adds survivability too.

overlord_backpack.name: The Closer
overlord_backpack.fixed_attribute: Perfect Adrenaline Rush: Within 10m of 2+ hostiles, gain +23% bonus armor for 5s
overlord_backpack.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
overlord_backpack.notes: Named Overlord backpack. Perfect Adrenaline Rush provides strong close-range survivability. Good for aggressive SMG and shotgun builds.

pristine_example.name: Pristine Example
pristine_example.fixed_attribute: Perfect Focus: +6% weapon damage per second while scoped at 8x+ magnification, up to 60%
pristine_example.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
pristine_example.notes: Named Airaldi chest. Perfect Focus rewards sustained scoped aiming with massive weapon damage stacking. Best-in-slot for dedicated marksman rifle builds using 8x+ scopes.

liquid_engineer.name: Liquid Engineer
liquid_engineer.fixed_attribute: Perfect Bloodsucker: Killing an enemy adds and refreshes a stack of +12% bonus armor for 10s, stacking up to 10 times
liquid_engineer.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
liquid_engineer.notes: Named Belstone backpack. Perfect Bloodsucker stacks massive bonus armor on kills, enabling Intimidate chest talent. Best-in-slot armor stacking piece for aggressive tank and hybrid builds.

the_setup.name: The Setup
the_setup.fixed_attribute: Perfectly Opportunistic: Enemies hit with shotguns or marksman rifles take 15% amplified damage from all sources for 5s
the_setup.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
the_setup.notes: Named Uzina Getica backpack. Perfectly Opportunistic amplifies team damage on shotgun/MMR hits. Strong in group play and burst damage builds.

firm_handshake.name: Firm Handshake
firm_handshake.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
firm_handshake.notes: Named Sokolov gloves with status effect bonus. Pairs well with SMG status builds using Sadist or Eclipse Protocol. The Sokolov 1pc SMG damage bonus adds weapon damage to status-focused loadouts.

claws_out.name: Claws Out
claws_out.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
claws_out.notes: Named Česká holster with melee damage bonus. Extremely niche — mostly for meme builds. The Česká 1pc CHC bonus is still useful for DPS builds.

devils_due.name: Devil's Due
devils_due.fixed_attribute: Perfect Bloodsucker: Killing an enemy adds a stack of +12% bonus armor (max 6 stacks)
devils_due.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
devils_due.notes: Named Badger Tuff backpack. Perfect Bloodsucker stacks bonus armor on kills. Effective in close-range aggressive builds where kills come frequently.

the_wake.name: The Wake
the_wake.fixed_attribute: Perfect Unhinged: +23% Weapon Damage, -35% Weapon Handling
the_wake.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
the_wake.notes: Named M60. Perfect Unhinged provides the highest flat damage bonus on any LMG talent. The handling penalty is brutal but manageable from cover with Braced chest talent.

good_times.name: Good Times
good_times.fixed_attribute: Perfect Fast Hands: Critical hits add +7% reload speed (stacks up to 20)
good_times.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
good_times.notes: Named RPK. Perfect Fast Hands dramatically speeds up reloads when landing crits. Good for high-CHC LMG builds that want faster reload cycles.

dare.name: Dare
dare.fixed_attribute: Perfect Close & Personal: Killing enemies within 7m grants +30% weapon damage for 10s
dare.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
dare.notes: Named FAL. Perfect Close & Personal rewards aggressive push-and-kill playstyles. Effective in CQB content like Summit and Countdown.

the_carbine_7.name: Harmony
the_carbine_7.fixed_attribute: Perfect Spike: Headshots grant +25% Skill Damage for 20s
the_carbine_7.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
the_carbine_7.notes: Named Mk17. Perfect Spike is the go-to rifle for skill hybrid builds. Easy headshots with a rifle keep the +25% skill damage buff permanently active.

catharsis.name: Catharsis
catharsis.fixed_attribute: Unique: When at full armor, receiving damage repairs 20% armor to all allies within 20m. Cooldown 20s.
catharsis.source: Named Bosses, Season Rewards, Named Item Caches
catharsis.notes: Powerful team support mask. Provides passive group healing just by being at full armor when hit. Excellent in tank builds that can maintain full armor through regeneration.

the_orbit.name: The Orbit
the_orbit.fixed_attribute: Perfect Naked: Headshot kills from over 35m grant +50% Headshot Damage for 5s, stacks up to 3x
the_orbit.source: Targeted Loot, Season Rewards, Named Item Caches
the_orbit.notes: Named Hunting M44. Perfect Naked rewards long-range sniper play. Stacking headshot damage is powerful but requires consistent headshots from distance.

rock_n_roll.name: Rock n' Roll
rock_n_roll.fixed_attribute: Perfect Optimist: Weapon damage is increased by +15% for every 10% of your magazine that is empty
rock_n_roll.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
rock_n_roll.notes: Named SASG-12. Perfect Optimist provides increasing damage as you empty the magazine. The semi-auto nature of the SASG makes it consistent.

wicked_vixen.name: Wicked Vixen
wicked_vixen.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
wicked_vixen.notes: Named Wyvern mask with skill duration bonus. Useful for skill builds that benefit from extended deployable durations (Turrets, Hive, etc.).

the_grudge_lmg.name: Carnage
the_grudge_lmg.fixed_attribute: Perfect Sadist: +20% weapon damage to bleeding targets
the_grudge_lmg.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
the_grudge_lmg.notes: Named Infantry MG5. Perfect Sadist pairs well with bleed-inducing skills and gear sets (Ongoing Directive, Striker). High RPM of MG5 makes it an excellent damage dealer.

new_reliable.name: New Reliable
new_reliable.fixed_attribute: Perfect Ranger: +2% weapon damage per 5m distance from target
new_reliable.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
new_reliable.notes: Named M16A2. Perfect Ranger makes this effective at range. Burst-fire M16 has good accuracy making the distance bonus reliable.

the_answer.name: The Answer
the_answer.fixed_attribute: Perfect Preservation: Killing an enemy repairs 12% armor over 3s, headshot kills repair 24%
the_answer.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
the_answer.notes: Named Classic M60. Perfect Preservation provides self-sustain through kills. Solid LMG for solo play where healing sources are limited.

deathgrips.name: Deathgrips
deathgrips.source: Dark Zone Targeted Loot, DZ Vendor
deathgrips.notes: DZ-exclusive named 5.11 gloves. +10% Armor on Kill provides strong sustain in aggressive builds. The 5.11 1pc +30% Health bonus adds raw HP on top.

percussive_maintenance.name: Percussive Maintenance
percussive_maintenance.fixed_attribute: Perfect Tech Support: +25% skill damage for 27s on skill kills
percussive_maintenance.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
percussive_maintenance.notes: Named Alps backpack. Perfect Tech Support extends the skill damage buff duration to 27s, making it easy to maintain permanent uptime in skill-kill-heavy builds.

motherly_love.name: Motherly Love
motherly_love.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
motherly_love.notes: Named Alps gloves with skill repair bonus. Useful in healer builds that want Alps brand bonuses alongside dedicated repair stats.

everyday_carrier.name: Everyday Carrier
everyday_carrier.fixed_attribute: Perfectly Efficient: 75% chance to not consume armor kit
everyday_carrier.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
everyday_carrier.notes: Named Belstone chest. Perfectly Efficient provides excellent armor kit conservation. Combined with Belstone's 1pc armor regen, it creates a highly self-sustaining tank setup.

picaros_holster.name: Picaro's Holster
picaros_holster.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
picaros_holster.notes: Named Brazos holster with flat weapon damage bonus. Popular in hybrid builds that want Brazos 2pc +1 Skill Tier alongside strong weapon damage from the holster.

hermano.name: Hermano
hermano.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
hermano.notes: Named Brazos backpack. Perfect Overclock grants allies near your deployed skills reload speed and cooldown reduction. Useful in coordinated group skill support builds.

battery_pack.name: Battery Pack
battery_pack.fixed_attribute: Perfect Calculated: kills reduce skill cooldowns by 30%
battery_pack.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
battery_pack.notes: Named Empress backpack. Perfect Calculated provides massive cooldown reduction on kills from cover. Pairs excellently with Empress 3pc Skill Efficiency in pure skill builds.

pointman.name: Pointman
pointman.fixed_attribute: Perfect Vanguard: shield grants +45% bonus armor to allies for 20s
pointman.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
pointman.notes: Named Gila chest. Perfect Vanguard is best-in-slot for shield tank builds, providing massive team-wide bonus armor on shield deployment. Essential in Foundry Bulwark setups.

nightwatcher.name: Nightwatcher
nightwatcher.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
nightwatcher.notes: Named Gila mask with Scanner Pulse Haste. Enables near-permanent pulse uptime for Spotter/Flatline builds. One of the most popular named masks in the game.

carpenter.name: Carpenter
carpenter.fixed_attribute: Perfectly Mad Bomber: grenade radius +75%, grenade kills refund
carpenter.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
carpenter.notes: Named Lengmo chest. Perfectly Mad Bomber enhances grenade radius and refunds grenades on kills. Pairs with Survivalist specialization for grenade-heavy playstyles.

backbone.name: Backbone
backbone.fixed_attribute: Perfectly Unstoppable Force: +5% weapon damage per kill, max 7 stacks
backbone.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
backbone.notes: Named Lengmo backpack. Perfectly Unstoppable Force stacks weapon damage on kills. Strong in kill-heavy content like Countdown and open world farming.

closer.name: Closer
closer.fixed_attribute: Perfect Spotter: +20% damage to pulsed enemies
closer.source: Targeted Loot, Clan Vendor, Cassie Mendoza, Named Item Caches
closer.notes: Named Uzina Getica chest. Perfect Spotter amplifies all damage to pulsed enemies by 20%. Pairs with Flatline weapon talent and Nightwatcher mask for permanent pulse-damage synergy.

matador.name: Matador
matador.fixed_attribute: Perfect Adrenaline Rush: +23% bonus armor within 10m of enemy
matador.source: Dark Zone Targeted Loot, DZ Vendor
matador.notes: DZ-exclusive named Walker backpack. Perfect Adrenaline Rush provides massive bonus armor at close range, enabling Intimidate chest talent. Top-tier PvP and aggressive PvE piece.

quickstep.name: Quickstep
quickstep.fixed_attribute: Sport Mode: +20% Movement Speed while unholstered (does not stack with other movement speed bonuses)
quickstep.source: Event-Limited: Halloween 2025 Project Chain, Winter Gameplay Caches, Seasonal Event Rewards
quickstep.notes: Named Tactical M1911 added in Y7S2.2. Sport Mode's +20% movement speed is unique and always active while the pistol is out — no kills or procs needed. Extremely strong for PvP repositioning and aggressive PvE play. Event-limited item; not in the standard targeted loot pool.
